$comment: Canonical reference of MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers used by this project. The 'command' paths point at the preinstalled node_modules in this folder (see package.json). Remote servers (tavily, github) are loaded over HTTP and need no local install. opencode reads the active config from .opencode/opencode.json; this file documents and mirrors it. To add a server: npm install it here, add a script/command in package.json, then wire it into ../opencode.json.

playwright.$desc: Browser automation & inspection (drives real Chromium/Edge). Used for UI testing and scraping.

context7.$desc: Up-to-date library/framework documentation lookup, resolved to exact versions.

sequential-thinking.$desc: Step-by-step reasoning MCP server for complex, multi-step problem decomposition.

fetch.$desc: Fetch a URL and return cleaned content (markdown/text) for reading or summarizing.

github.$desc: GitHub repos, issues, PRs. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

required_env.CONTEXT7_API_KEY: Optional — context7 works without it but rate-limited.
required_env.TAVILY_API_KEY: Required for the tavily remote search server.
required_env.GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN: Required for the github remote server.
required_env.E2B_API_KEY: Only if you re-enable the e2b code-execution server.
